title: Customer Service Executive
description:
Customer service executives use their skills and experience to ensure that a company delivers the highest standards of service to customers, aims to maximize customer satisfaction and identifying new opportunity.

Maintaining consistent quality control, standardizing procedures and policies, and establishing expectations of customer service.

Interact with customers to provide and process information in response to enquiries, concerns and requests about quotation and operational matters in a timely and accurate manner and providing excellent customer services.


Job Responsibilities:

· Handle enquiries, prepare quotations, process shipment and transport requests.

· Manage incoming calls

· Coordinate with customers for their local, import and export shipments

· Understand import and export process

· To complete all required documentations on time.

· To provide customers with proof of deliveries on time

· To submit all documents for billing on time

· Provide assistance with sales and marketing activities as required

· Build sustainable relationships and trust with customer accounts through open and interactive communication

· Provide accurate, valid and complete information by using the right methods/tools

· Handle customer complaints, provide appropriate solutions and alternatives within the time limits; follow up to ensure resolution. Keep records of customer interactions, process customer accounts and file documents.

· Follow communication procedures, guidelines and policies

· To liaise with customers/drivers with regards to any delivery issues

· Tallying/monitoring of deliveries’ invoices

· Check and following up of returns

· To report incidents and hazards as per the relevant working instructions.

· Ensure accurate data entry in reports

· Any other ad hoc task assigned


Job Requirements:

· GCE “O” level certification or ITE certificate or Diploma holder

· At least 2 years of working experience in the related field is required for this position. Demonstrate ability to handle work professionally, independently and efficiently with a strong customer service mindset

· Possess effective organizational and follow-up skills, paying attention to detail

· Good working attitude with positive customer mindset

· Able to work under pressure in a fast-paced environment

· Good to have at least basic experience in sea/ air shipment procedures

· Team player, independent with good communications skills.

· Good interpersonal skills and able to interface with all levels, internally and externally, in a professional and responsive manner

postedCompany.description:
HUB Distributors Services is a member of the Singapore Logistics Association since 1990. We are awarded the Total Defence Award in 1996, 1999, 2001, 2003 and 2005 for commendable contributions to National Defence. Subsequently, HUB Distributors Services was awarded the MDA (Minister for Defence Award) and included in the prestigious MIDAS league members in 2009.

In 2010, HUB Distributors was certified a partner of the Singapore customs under Secure Trade Partnership (STP) to pledge commitment to adopt and implement appropriate security measures to keep our supply chains secured. In 2013, HUB Distributors Services was awarded the Promising SME 500 and in 2014, the Singapore SME 1000.

 

HUB Distributors Services was incorporated in 1988 and has since grown from a humble beginning of 4 vehicles to a full-fledged logistics company in the supply chain industry. Backed by a dedicated and committed team, the company is confident of meeting all customers’ logistics and distribution needs.

From our roots in Singapore, we have widened our reach beyond our shores and place several agents in strategic cities across the globe such as Hong Kong, Shanghai, Shenzhen, Beijing, Jakarta, Tokyo, Seoul, Rotterdam, Hamburg, London, New York etc.

Mission:

To provide innovative and logistical solutions that will change the way you think about logistics

Vision:

At HUB, we aim to be the logistics company that offers the best user experience for every consumer
postedCompany.name: HUB DISTRIBUTORS SERVICES PTE LTD
